judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong margins and profitability, trading at a reasonable PEG ratio despite high absolute multiples.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 16.8%; next earnings date is 2026-07-28.
positives: Revenue growth 44.1% YoY and earnings growth 108.3% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 21.6% and Return on Equity 1788.0% demonstrate exceptional profitability.
PEG ratio of 0.51 suggests the stock is undervalued relative to its earnings growth.
Free cash flow of $1.61B indicates robust cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 75.46 and Price/Book of 376.92 are very high, indicating a premium valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 381.55 is high, suggesting significant leverage.
Quick ratio of 0.77 indicates potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Beta of 2.01 suggests higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Seagate Technology (STX) saw its stock bounce back following positive Nvidia results, though Jim Cramer recently called the name "too pricey." The stock's movement appears to be influenced by broader tech sector sentiment and analyst commentary, with no specific company-driven catalyst immediately apparent. Traders should consider the conflicting signals from sector-wide trends and high-profile opinions.

headlines.title: Seagate Stock, Western Digital Bounce Back After Nvidia Results
